tasks.subject: Task 0: Fix DB connection-per-query anti-pattern in ui/db_reader.py
Task 1: Scope rglob in check_old_session_names (#38) — saves 1,800ms
Task 2: Skip already-imported modules in check_all_imports_resolve (#16) — saves 1,300ms
Task 3: Shared DB connection for requires_db drift checks — saves 400ms
Task 4: Phase 1 checkpoint — verify drift check savings
Task 5: Debounce post-edit hook — saves ~16s per rapid-edit batch
Task 6: Parallel health check phases via ThreadPoolExecutor — saves ~5min
Task 7: File content cache in check_drift.py (bonus) — saves ~100ms
Task 8: Final verification and timing benchmark
